name: Ministry of Defense and Support for Armed Forces of Islamic Republic of Iran v. Elahi
question: Does the Terrorism Risk Insurance Act of 2002 allow a judgment creditor in a wrongful death action against the Iranian government to attach damages recovered by Iran in an unrelated contract dispute as the "blocked assets of [a] terrorist party?"
description: A case in which the Court held that the defendant's assets in question were not "blocked" under the Terrorism Risk Insurance Act of 2002 and therefore could not be attached to satisfy his judgment against Iran.
